title: SANGRIAfy
description: "Succinct Abbreviation Naturally Germinates Rather Immaculate Art." - Ryoshu, Limbus Company. This mod turns your chat text for you into abbreviations.
body:
# Description
A very cursed mod that lets you speak like Ryoshu from Limbus Company. Turns your messages in chat into abbreviations. Very succinct indeed.

This mod has a client version and a server version. When using the client version, when you send a text message with this mod, it will convert your message into a SANGRIA. It can be used on any server supporting 1.20.1, even if the server doesn't have the mod. When using the server version, when you send a text message with this mod, it converts your message into a SANGRIA, and also displays the original text when other players hover over it.

You may customize the style of your SANGRIA in the config (client-version only) and also with commands (client-version and server-version).

# Commands:

### Put a . prefix if using the client version, and / prefix if using the server version.
<> = required arguments, () = optional, the rest: literal.
- sangriafy: enables/disables the mod.
- sangriafy info (flags|settings): See this description again! Or see possible flags and settings, and what they do.
- sangriafy info multisettings (example1|example2|example3): Shows you examples on how to use multisettings.
- sangriafy settings <option>: If the option is a boolean, toggles the value.
- sangriafy settings <option> (get|(set <true|false>)). Gets the current value for the option, or sets it to a new one.
- sangriafy multisettings <flags>: Toggles or sets multiple values at once.

## Compatability
Not compatible with Beautified Chat Server or Client.
Is compatible with ChatPlus and ChatNotify.

## Other features
Data now stays persistent.
